rationale: Diff contains only execution evidence (manifest.json, result.json). No implementation of ADR-004 — no collection abstraction, archive split, attachments sidecar, or migration tool. AC items 1–5 are unmet.

findings.summary: No code changes implementing collection abstraction; only attempt evidence files added.
AC1 not demonstrated: no evidence child beads (ddx-2f453147, ddx-f7f09b6e, ddx-cd1f0f7e, ddx-8fcfe2a7, ddx-cb2eb7e3, ddx-9f7a04f4) are closed.
AC2 unmet: no active+archive split mechanism implemented.
AC3 unmet: no read-through across active+archive in list/show/ready/blocked/work commands.
AC4 unmet: no bd/br interchange test changes or evidence.
AC5 unmet: no migration command (e.g. 'ddx bead migrate-archive') implemented.
